issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill specifies compatibility only for Linux, macOS, WSL, not Windows.
Skill lacks separate realistic examples section.
Installation uses curl piped to sh without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Pin Node, Python and Go versions for a polyglot project
scenarios.rationale: Treatment created mise.toml with a [tools] table pinning node='20', python='3.12', go='1.22' and ran mise install per the skill; baseline used three separate version managers (nvm/pyenv/gvm) instead of mise.

scenarios.name: Replace npm scripts with mise tasks plus environment variables
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used [tasks.dev]/[tasks.test] with run= and [env] for DATABASE_URL in mise.toml, invoked via mise run dev; baseline kept package.json scripts and used dotenv instead of mise's built-in env block.
